data.title: EXCLUSIVE: MIRA Pharmaceuticals Files FDA Application To Start Human Trials For Its Lead Pain Treatment
data.description: MIRA Pharmaceuticals submits an IND for Ketamir-2, aiming to treat neuropathic pain with 100% pain reversal shown in preclinical studies.
